posts.author: Kuntai
posts.title_es: Organizaciones Vivas: del organigrama al ecosistema
posts.excerpt_es: El paso de estructuras rígidas a sistemas biológicos adaptables que responden en tiempo real al entorno.
posts.title_en: Living Organizations: from org chart to ecosystem
posts.excerpt_en: The shift from rigid structures to adaptive biological systems that respond to the environment in real time.
